job_description:
Role Overview

We are seeking a highly skilled Senior Power BI Specialist to design, develop, and manage end-to-end reporting solutions across the organization. The ideal candidate will be responsible for building scalable data pipelines, managing reporting data stores, and delivering insightful dashboards through Power BI for multiple business functions including HR, Sales, and Management.

Qualifications

  • Bachelor’s or master’s degree in computer science, Information Technology, Statistics, Mathematics, or a related field.
  • Microsoft Certified: Data Analyst Associate (PL-300) is highly preferred.
  • Additional certifications in Azure or related Microsoft data tools will be an advantage.

Key Responsibilities

  1. Data Engineering & ETL Development
  2. Design and maintain a centralized reporting data store using a single SQL database.
  3. Develop and manage ETL processes to transform and consolidate data from multiple business systems.
  4. Create and optimize stored procedures for efficient data processing and transformation.

  5. Ensure data integrity, performance, and scalability of reporting pipelines.

  6. Data Integration & Export

  7. Build and maintain data export services to move data into the Data Warehouse (DWH).
  8. Implement processes to replicate Mercury DB into reporting tables.

  9. Ensure reliable, automated, and scheduled data refresh pipelines.

  10. Power BI Reporting & Applications

  11. Develop and manage multiple Power BI Apps for different audiences:
    • Management Reports App – General business reporting segmented by stakeholders.
    • HR Reports App – HR and Learning & Development dashboards.
    • Sales Reporting App (Embedded) – Reports embedded within the Mercury application (e.g., gamification, org charts).
  12. Design intuitive, performant, and visually compelling dashboards.

  13. Implement role-based access control (RLS) and audience-specific reporting.

  14. Embedded & External Reporting

  15. Integrate Power BI Embedded reports within internal applications (e.g., Mercury App).
  16. Enable reporting outputs for external display systems such as TV dashboards (e.g., ScreenCloud).

  17. Collaborate with product and engineering teams to ensure seamless embedding and user experience.

  18. Reporting Data Model & Table Management

  19. Create and maintain reporting tables optimized for Power BI consumption.
  20. Update reporting tables to reflect:
    • User lifecycle changes (onboarding, offboarding, role changes)
    • New product features and business requirements

  21. Ensure proper data modeling (star/snowflake schema) for performance optimization.

  22. Governance, Performance & Maintenance

  23. Monitor report usage, performance, and optimize dashboards.
  24. Implement data governance, quality checks, and monitoring dashboards.
  25. Manage dataset refresh schedules, incremental loads, and performance tuning.

  26. Maintain documentation for data models, ETL processes, and reporting logic.

  27. Stakeholder Collaboration

  28. Work closely with HR, Sales, Marketing, and Leadership teams to understand reporting needs.
  29. Translate business requirements into technical specifications and dashboards.
  30. Provide training and support to end users for Power BI applications.

Required Skills & Qualifications

  • Strong expertise in Power BI (Desktop, Service, Embedded)
  • Advanced SQL skills (query optimization, stored procedures, indexing)
  • Experience in ETL development and data pipeline design
  • Knowledge of data warehousing concepts (DWH, star schema, normalization)
  • Experience with data integration and replication processes
  • Familiarity with Power BI App workspace management & deployment pipelines
  • Experience with Row-Level Security (RLS) and data governance

Preferred Skills

  • Experience with Azure Data Services (Azure SQL, Data Factory, Synapse)
  • Exposure to API integrations and real-time data pipelines
  • Experience with embedded analytics (Power BI Embedded)
  • Knowledge of reporting automation and monitoring tools

Soft Skills

  • Strong analytical and problem-solving abilities
  • Excellent communication and stakeholder management
  • Ability to work in a fast-paced, cross-functional environment
  • High attention to detail and data accuracy

Key Deliverables

  • Fully functional reporting data store and ETL pipelines
  • Scalable Power BI apps for multiple business units
  • Embedded reporting within internal applications
  • Reliable and up-to-date reporting tables
  • High-performance dashboards with strong user adoption

Contact

If this opportunity aligns with your career goals, kindly share your updated resume with us at theertha.ajay@linnk.com.

job_description:
Data Engineer/Database Administrator (DBA)

We are seeking a skilled Database Administrator (DBA) professional with strong expertise in database management, data security, and governance, along with experience in enterprise data integration.

The ideal candidate will be responsible for ensuring the performance, availability, security, and compliance of database systems, while also supporting data engineering initiatives such as data integration and pipeline development. This role plays a critical part in safeguarding enterprise data, enforcing governance standards, and enabling reliable analytics across the organization.

Key Responsibilities:

  • Manage, monitor, and maintain database systems across cloud and hybrid environments, ensuring high availability, performance, and reliability.
  • Perform database performance tuning, query optimization, indexing, and capacity planning.
  • Design and implement backup, recovery, and disaster recovery strategies.
  • Implement and enforce data security practices, including role-based access control (RBAC), encryption (at rest and in transit), and access management.
  • Apply data masking and anonymization techniques to protect sensitive and confidential data.
  • Enforce data governance policies, standards, and compliance requirements (e.g., GDPR) across database systems.
  • Monitor, audit, and track database access, usage, and security events to ensure compliance and risk mitigation.
  • Plan and execute database migrations, upgrades, and patching activities.
  • Support ETL/ELT processes and data integration workflows across enterprise systems.
  • Handle and support ingestion of structured, semi-structured, and unstructured data, including databases, files (CSV, JSON, XML), and document-based formats (PDFs, images, audio).
  • Collaborate with data engineers and architects to design scalable and optimized data architectures and storage solutions.
  • Ensure alignment between database design, data pipelines, and business requirements.
  • Maintain documentation for database configurations, security controls, and operational procedures.

Required Qualifications:

  • 5+ years of experience as a Database Administrator (DBA) with exposure to data engineering principles.
  • Strong expertise in:
  • Database performance tuning, query optimization, and indexing
  • Backup, recovery, and disaster recovery strategies
  • High availability and reliability of database systems
  • Hands-on experience with data security practices, including:
  • Role-based access control (RBAC)
  • Encryption (at rest and in transit)
  • User and access management
  • Experience implementing data masking or anonymization techniques for sensitive data.
  • Solid understanding of data governance principles and compliance requirements (e.g., GDPR, ISO 27001).
  • Advanced proficiency in SQL and working knowledge of Python (or similar scripting language).
  • Experience working with relational database systems (e.g., SQL Server, Oracle, PostgreSQL, MySQL).
  • Familiarity with ETL/ELT processes and data integration concepts.
  • Experience handling structured, semi-structured, and unstructured data (e.g., JSON, XML, PDFs, images).

Preferred Qualifications:

  • Experience with cloud-based database platforms (preferably Microsoft Azure or equivalent).
  • Relevant certifications such as Microsoft Certified: Azure Database Administrator Associate or relevant.
  • Familiarity with data protection regulations and compliance frameworks (e.g., GDPR, ISO 27001) and their implementation.
  • Experience with database monitoring, auditing, and security tools.
